name: Github Visit Button
css: /* From Uiverse.io by kamehame-ha */ .button { display: flex; justify-content: center; align-items: center; padding: 10px 15px; gap: 15px; background-color: #181717; outline: 3px #181717 solid; outline-offset: -3px; border-radius: 5px; border: none; cursor: pointer; transition: 400ms; } .button .text { color: white; font-weight: 700; font-size: 1em; transition: 400ms; } .button svg path { transition: 400ms; } .button:hover { background-color: transparent; } .button:hover .text { color: #181717; } .button:hover svg path { fill: #181717; }

name: Google Play Button
description: Transparent button with border + color invert on hover
css: .btn-outline { background: transparent; color: #080808; border: 2px solid #080808; padding: 12px 28px; cursor: pointer; font-size: 13px; font-weight: 700; letter-spacing: 0.12em; text-transform: uppercase; transition: all 0.25s; } .btn-outline:hover { background: #080808; color: #fff; }

name: Gradient
description: Smooth gradient background with glow hover
css: .btn-gradient { background: linear-gradient(135deg, #ff7a18, #af002d 70%); color: #fff; border: none; padding: 12px 28px; cursor: pointer; font-size: 13px; font-weight: 700; letter-spacing: 0.12em; text-transform: uppercase; transition: 0.25s; } .btn-gradient:hover { filter: brightness(1.15); box-shadow: 0 0 12px rgba(255, 122, 24, 0.6); }

name: Pill
description: Rounded pill button with soft hover
css: .btn-pill { background: #111; color: #fff; border: none; padding: 12px 32px; border-radius: 999px; cursor: pointer; font-size: 13px; font-weight: 700; letter-spacing: 0.12em; text-transform: uppercase; transition: 0.25s; } .btn-pill:hover { background: #333; }

name: Ghost
description: Minimal ghost button with subtle hover fill
css: .btn-ghost { background: transparent; color: #111; border: 1px solid transparent; padding: 12px 28px; cursor: pointer; font-size: 13px; font-weight: 700; letter-spacing: 0.12em; text-transform: uppercase; transition: 0.25s; } .btn-ghost:hover { border-color: #111; background: rgba(0,0,0,0.05); }

name: Neon Glow
css: .btn-neon { background: #0d0d0d; color: #0ff; border: 2px solid #0ff; padding: 12px 28px; cursor: pointer; font-size: 13px; font-weight: 700; letter-spacing: 0.12em; text-transform: uppercase; transition: 0.25s; } .btn-neon:hover { box-shadow: 0 0 12px #0ff, 0 0 24px #0ff; }

name: 3D Press
css: .btn-3d { background: #4a4a4a; color: #fff; border: none; padding: 12px 28px; cursor: pointer; font-size: 13px; font-weight: 700; letter-spacing: 0.12em; text-transform: uppercase; box-shadow: 0 4px 0 #2e2e2e; transition: 0.15s; } .btn-3d:active { transform: translateY(4px); box-shadow: 0 0 0 #2e2e2e; }

name: Animated Border
css: .btn-border-anim { background: transparent; color: #111; padding: 12px 28px; border: none; position: relative; cursor: pointer; font-size: 13px; font-weight: 700; letter-spacing: 0.12em; text-transform: uppercase; } .btn-border-anim::before, .btn-border-anim::after { content: ''; position: absolute; width: 0; height: 2px; background: #111; transition: 0.3s; } .btn-border-anim::before { left: 0; bottom: 0; } .btn-border-anim::after { right: 0; top: 0; } .btn-border-anim:hover::before, .btn-border-anim:hover::after { width: 100%; }

name: Ripple
css: .btn-ripple { background: #222; color: #fff; border: none; padding: 12px 28px; cursor: pointer; font-size: 13px; font-weight: 700; letter-spacing: 0.12em; text-transform: uppercase; position: relative; overflow: hidden; } .btn-ripple::after { content: ''; position: absolute; width: 10px; height: 10px; background: rgba(255,255,255,0.4); border-radius: 50%; transform: scale(0); opacity: 0; transition: transform 0.4s, opacity 0.8s; } .btn-ripple:active::after { transform: scale(20); opacity: 1; left: var(--x); top: var(--y); }
js: document.addEventListener('click', e => { if(e.target.classList.contains('btn-ripple')) { const rect = e.target.getBoundingClientRect(); e.target.style.setProperty('--x', (e.clientX - rect.left) + 'px'); e.target.style.setProperty('--y', (e.clientY - rect.top) + 'px'); }});

name: Icon Left
css: .btn-icon-left { background: #111; color: #fff; border: none; padding: 12px 28px; cursor: pointer; font-size: 13px; font-weight: 700; letter-spacing: 0.12em; text-transform: uppercase; display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 10px; transition: 0.25s; } .btn-icon-left:hover { background: #333; }

name: Soft UI
css: .btn-soft { background: #e0e0e0; color: #111; border: none; padding: 12px 28px; cursor: pointer; font-size: 13px; font-weight: 700; letter-spacing: 0.12em; text-transform: uppercase; border-radius: 12px; box-shadow: 6px 6px 12px #bebebe, -6px -6px 12px #ffffff; transition: 0.25s; } .btn-soft:hover { box-shadow: 3px 3px 6px #bebebe, -3px -3px 6px #ffffff; }
